name: Freeze Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to create a freeze effect!

name: Nuke Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to create a nuke!

name: Medium Explosion Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to create a medium explosion!

name: Large Explosion Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to create a large explosion!

name: Lava Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to create a lava pool!

name: All Aboard Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to go on the enemy's boat!

name: Water Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to create a water pool!

name: Blind Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to blind nearby enemies!

name: Heal Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to heal nearby allies!

name: Fireball Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to launch a fireball!

name: Poison Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to poison nearby enemies!

name: Teleport Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to teleport to its landing spot!

name: Grass Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to create a grass patch!

name: Nausea Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to give nearby enemies nausea!

name: Anvil Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to drop an anvil!

name: Monster Sheep
description: Throw this sheep to spawn monsters!
